meaning: n.[机] 吊楔,起重爪 Lewis 刘易斯(男子名)
examples: Lewis has grown philosophical about life.
Lewis will compete in both sprints in Stuttgart.
Mitchell beat Lewis by three-hundredths of a second.
Mr Lewis added that he would be making an announcement on this issue in due course.
Lewis Perling, a defense attorney for the Atlanta-based credit bureau, declined to comment on the litigation.
